message:
fix(security): enforce 0600 permissions on env files containing bearer tokens

save_token_to_env_file() used std::fs::write() without setting restrictive
permissions, leaving .env files world-readable (0644) on default umask. Any
local user on a shared system could read the HTTP bearer token. Now enforces
0600 on unix after write, matching the pattern already used by ConfigAction.

Closes #24

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
